articles.description: England head coach Steve Borthwick makes 12 changes - nine personnel switches and three positional shifts - as he revamps his side to face Italy on Saturday
articles.title: Six Nations: Fin Smith comes into revamped England team to face Italy

articles.description: Former England captain Michael Vaughan says England have a better spin attack than India and he has a "funny feeling" Harry Brook's side will win Thursday's T20 World Cup semi-final.
articles.title: T20 World Cup 2026: England have better spinners - they can beat India, says Michael Vaughan

articles.description: Who are the best centre-forwards of the 21st century? We've had a go at trying to whittle down a pretty formidable list.
articles.title: Erling Haaland, Harry Kane, Ronaldo: Ranking the best centre-forwards of the 21st century

articles.description: Brighton manager Fabian Hurzeler calls for stricter rules around set-pieces and criticises upcoming opponents Arsenal for time-wasting.
articles.title: Arsenal set-pieces: Brighton's Fabian Hurzeler criticises Gunners
Should we have high hopes for Hamilton and Ferrari? F1 Q&A

articles.description: Listen to BBC radio commentary and follow live text updates and match stats as England take on Ukraine in a Women's World Cup Qualifier.
articles.title: Women's World Cup Qualifier LIVE: Ukraine vs England - radio commentary, text updates, stats & head-to-head

articles.description: England's players are worried about being turned into "political spokespeople" at the World Cup, the chief executive of the Professional Footballers' Association says.
articles.title: World Cup 2026: England squad worried about being turned into 'political spokespeople'

articles.description: With 100 days until the World Cup, BBC Sport looks at the favourites to win, as well as players to watch and who could be outside contenders.
articles.title: 100 days until the World Cup: Who will win? Plus players to watch

articles.description: Tottenham have written to Professional Game Match Officials Limited (PGMOL) chief Howard Webb to raise their concerns over key refereeing decisions, sources have told BBC Sport.
articles.title: Tottenham: Spurs write to PGMOL chief Howard Webb over refereeing decisions

articles.description: Jon Rahm claims the DP World Tour is "extorting players" as he outlined why he is not among a group of LIV Golf competitors to have signed a settlement enabling them to play in both organisations' tournaments.
articles.title: Rahm accuses DP World Tour of 'extorting players'
